description: Camorra clan operating in the eastern suburbs of Naples, specifically Ponticelli and Cercola. Founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa, known as 'o sicco, born in 1971. The clan was hostile to the Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno clans, engaging in a bloody war for territorial control. After the arrest of its founder and the killing of his successor Giuseppe Mignano, the clan was eliminated by the Sarno clan.
